title: hunteria oxyantha
intro: Hunteria oxyantha, also known as the African dogbane or ivory nut, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in African and Asian cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Hunteria oxyantha include its ability to alleviate fever, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as malaria and snake bites. Hunteria oxyantha is often prepared as a herbal remedy by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and the resulting infusion is used to treat various ailments.
